tools.name: get-morning-brief
tools.description: Generate a prioritized morning briefing from a unified array of async messages (email, Slack, Linear). Returns urgent items, hot deals, and today's commitments.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "iaapp-a912a14e.alpic.live" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get-morning-brief · Public sink: get-morning-brief.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get-morning-brief · Public sink: get-morning-brief

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
